AI | Artificial Intelligence | Vibe Coding | Programming | Code LLMs | Thinking
Develop the right thinking process before its too late — The way to build better with AI

7 min read
Just now

--

Not a member?
Feel Free to access the full article here.
You must have also come across some people who are able to pull out a complete working website or app in a single afternoon.
Prompt, generate, run, fix, ship!
No degrees. No years of grinding LeetCode. Just clear thinking and a chat window.
And I noticed something interesting in myself while watching them.
Part of me was impressed. Part of me was uneasy.
Not because the code was bad. It wasn’t.
I was uneasy because I realized the skill that mattered in that room wasn’t typing. It was thinking.
And most of us have spent years training the wrong muscle!
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Image Created using ChatGPTHere’s the shift the whole industry is talking about right now, in their own words: we’re moving from “writing code” to “expressing intent.”
